TravelSegment.title: Travel Segment
TravelSegment.description: A record of a travel journey from one country to another.

departureCountry.description: The country the user is leaving from.

departureDate.description: The date and time of departure.

arrivalCountry.description: The country the user is arriving in.

arrivalDate.description: The date and time of arrival.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this record.

/travelSegments/{segmentId}.description: Collection of travel segments for all users.
